use_cases: Submitting forms and triggering actions with visual feedback via multiple variants
Navigating users between pages or sections with link-styled buttons
Opening modals, dropdowns, or dialogs with consistent button styling
Enabling destructive actions like delete or cancel with variant prop
Creating call-to-action buttons in hero sections or cards
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui-style Button component built with Radix UI Slot and CVA for flexible variant and size options. Supports 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes. Features proper accessibility with focus-visible outlines, shadow effects, and disabled states. Designed for general-purpose use across any SaaS, e-commerce, or application interface requiring consistent action triggers.
